families.rationale: Frozen law exercises Docker, HTTP, probe, runtime materialization, runtime state, ownership, retention, dispatch, or substrate behavior. Extracted core must keep only the closed language/contract boundary and cannot execute the interpreter.
families.replacement: #743 interpreter/runtime handoff; core retains closed protocol, lifecycle, verification, control-route, effect-boundary, and product-runtime contract values without owning effects.

families.rationale: Frozen Postgres scenario runner executes durable workflow services, stores, coordinator effects, projections, and advancement. Extracted core owns the pure contracts and scenario language, not the mutable acceptance runner.
families.replacement: #743 operations/cpk-server acceptance handoff; core contracts remain covered by EXTRACT.E successor proofs for planning, execution, reads, and process handoff.

families.rationale: Frozen control routes execute FastAPI/process mutation and authentication behavior. Extracted core owns closed control-route descriptor values; the executable process belongs to cpk-server or an interpreter-owned process package.
